from dataclasses import dataclass
from typing import Dict, List, Set


@dataclass
class ExperimentConfig:
    name: str
    hyperparameters: Dict[str, float] = {"learning_rate": 0.01, "batch_size": 32}
    feature_columns: List[str] = ["user_id", "timestamp"]
    excluded_models: Set[str] = set()
    augmentation_pipeline: List[str] = ["flip", "rotate"]
